rulesEtiquette: All visitors must cover their heads before entering the prayer hall. Scarves are available at the entrance if you don't have one.
Please remove your shoes before entering the main building. Shoe racks are provided at the entrance.
Tobacco products and alcohol are strictly prohibited on the Gurudwara premises.
Please dress modestly. Legs and shoulders should be covered. Long pants or skirts and shirts with sleeves are appropriate.

openingTimings.sundaySpecial: Weekly Kirtan Darbar: 11:00 AM - 1:00 PM followed by Langar

howToReach: U-Bahn: Take U8 to Pankstraße station (5 min walk)
Tram: M1 or 50 to Wollankstraße/Soldiner Straße

items.title: Vaisakhi Celebration 2026
items.description: Join us for the grand celebration of Vaisakhi, commemorating the formation of the Khalsa.

items.title: Gurpurab - Guru Nanak Dev Ji
items.description: Celebrate the birth anniversary of Guru Nanak Dev Ji with kirtan, prayers, and langar.

items.title: Weekly Kirtan Darbar
items.description: Weekly congregational singing of hymns from Sri Guru Granth Sahib Ji followed by langar.

items.title: Asa Di Var - Morning Prayer
items.description: Daily morning prayers with recitation of Asa Di Var.

items.title: Rehras Sahib - Evening Prayer
items.description: Daily evening prayers with Rehras Sahib.

items.title: Gurmukhi Learning Session
items.description: Learn to read and write Gurmukhi script. All ages welcome.

items.title: Monthly Sangat Gathering
items.description: Monthly congregation gathering for prayer, discussion, and fellowship.

items.title: Diwali Celebration
items.description: Join the community for prayers, kirtan, and celebration on Diwali.

cards.title: Photo Gallery
cards.description: Browse through albums organized by events, festivals, and community activities. Relive the beautiful moments from our celebrations.

cards.title: Videos
cards.description: Watch recordings of Kirtan, educational sessions, event highlights, and special programs from our Gurudwara.

cards.title: Live Kirtan
cards.description: Listen to live Kirtan streaming from our Gurudwara. Join us virtually for daily prayers and weekend programs.

updates.title: Vaisakhi 2026 Photo Album
updates.description: 145 new photos from our recent Vaisakhi celebration have been added to the gallery.

updates.title: New Educational Video Series
updates.description: Watch our new Gurbani Explained series to learn more about Sikh teachings and philosophy.
